message:
🌱 Add oauth2-proxy: Include PKCE - Code Challenge in Proxy (2nd try) mission (#955)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "oauth2-proxy-1361-include-pkce-code-challenge-in-proxy-2nd-try",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "oauth2-proxy: Include PKCE - Code Challenge in Proxy (2nd try)",
+    "description": "Include PKCE - Code Challenge in Proxy (2nd try). Requested by 20+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current oauth2-proxy deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your oauth2-proxy version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n oauth2-proxy -l app.kubernetes.io/name=oauth2-proxy\nhelm list -n oauth2-proxy 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working oauth2-proxy installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review oauth2-proxy configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant oauth2-proxy configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n oauth2-proxy -l app.kubernetes.io/name=oauth2-proxy\nkubectl get configmap -n oauth2-proxy -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=oauth2-proxy\n```\n## Expected Behavior\n\nFor security reasons It would be nice if the PKCE extension would be included in the proxy.\nhttps://www.oauth.com/oauth2-servers/pkce/."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Include PKCE - Code Challenge in Proxy (2nd try)",
+        "description": "Adds Code Challenge PKCE support (RFC-7636) and partial\nAuthorization Server Metadata (RFC-8414) for detecting PKCE support.\n\n- Introduces new option `--force-code-challenge-method` to force a\nspecific code challenge method (either `S256` or `plain`) for instances\nwhen the server has not\n```yaml\nhttps://YOUR_DOMAIN/authorize?\n    response_type=code&\n    code_challenge=CODE_CHALLENGE&\n    code_challenge_method=S256&\n    client_id=YOUR_CLIENT_ID&\n    redirect_uri=YOUR_CALLBACK_URL&\n    scope=SCOPE&\n    state=STATE\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n oauth2-proxy -l app.kubernetes.io/name=oauth2-proxy\nkubectl get events -n oauth2-proxy --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Include PKCE - Code Challenge in Proxy (2nd try)\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Adds Code Challenge PKCE support (RFC-7636) and partial\nAuthorization Server Metadata (RFC-8414) for detecting PKCE support.\n\n- Introduces new option `--force-code-challenge-method` to force a\nspecific code challenge method (either `S256` or `plain`) for instances\nwhen the server has not implemented RFC-8414 in order to detect\nPKCE support on the discovery document.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "https://YOUR_DOMAIN/authorize?\n    response_type=code&\n    code_challenge=CODE_CHALLENGE&\n    code_challenge_method=S256&\n    client_id=YOUR_CLIENT_ID&\n    redirect_uri=YOUR_CALLBACK_URL&\n    scope=SCOPE&\n    state=STATE"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "oauth2-proxy",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "oauth2-proxy"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/oauth2-proxy/oauth2-proxy/issues/1361",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/oauth2-proxy/oauth2-proxy",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/oauth2-proxy/oauth2-proxy/pull/1541"
+    },
+    "reactions": 20,
+    "comments": 14,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with oauth2-proxy installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-13T06:39:22.752Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
